name: 剧本锻造
examples_zh: 我有一篇5000字短篇小说，想改成影视剧本，先帮我看看适合什么形态
这是我确认好的短片剧本，帮我生成分镜表
剧本定稿了，帮我生成角色、场景、道具的数字资产清单
examples_en: I have a 5000-word short story. Help me turn it into a screenplay, first suggest the best format
Here is my confirmed short film script. Generate a shot list for me
The screenplay is locked. Generate a digital asset list for characters, scenes, and props
